text:
Second Return Date DATE 8 The date when the patient returns to the inpatient rehabilitation facility in a program interruption situation (Item 42 - a situation where a Medicare inpatient is discharged from the inpatient rehabilitation facility and returns to the same inpatient rehabilitation facility within 3 consecutive calendar days).
159 _43E TRNSFR_3_DT (43E) Third Interruption Date DATE 8 The third date when the patient leaves the inpatient rehabilitation facility in a program interruption
